g.text: 2 | vmalloc() | map .ko ELF into kernel vmem
3 | walk reloc table | resolve EXPORT_SYMBOL refs
4 | verify vermagic | must match uname -r exactly
context | insmod process, can sleep, GFP_KERNEL OK
symbols | exported via EXPORT_SYMBOL visible to others
code | .text in kernel vmem, callable by VFS dispatch
check refcnt | if > 0: EBUSY — device still open
kernel frees | vmalloc'd pages, kobjects, sysfs entries
